code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    mut token = ""
    mut output = ""
    mut first = true
    while i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
          if not string.is_empty(token)
            match string.parse_int(token)
            when Some(v)
              let doubled = v * 2
              if first
                output = "#{doubled}"
                first = false
              else
                output = "#{output} #{doubled}"
              end
            when None
              ()
            end
            token = ""
          end
        else
          token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        let doubled = v * 2
        if first
          output = "#{doubled}"
          first = false
        else
          output = "#{output} #{doubled}"
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    println(output)
  when None
    ()
  end
end
